name: rest-api
appliesWhen: any backend agent building/changing HTTP endpoints OR preferredStack implies a REST backend (nest/express/api)

officialRepos.name: OAI/OpenAPI-Specification
officialRepos.why: OpenAPI 3.1 spec — the contract-first source of truth for REST APIs.

officialRepos.name: microsoft/api-guidelines
officialRepos.why: Battle-tested REST design conventions: naming, versioning, errors, pagination.

officialRepos.name: zalando/restful-api-guidelines
officialRepos.why: Detailed, opinionated REST guidelines used at scale (pagination, problem+json).

officialRepos.name: stripe/openapi
officialRepos.why: Stripe's published OpenAPI specs; gold-standard idempotency, versioning, errors.

officialRepos.name: json-api/json-api
officialRepos.why: JSON:API conventions for filtering, sparse fieldsets, includes, pagination.
